purpose: 面向EI离子源的热电子发射、收集和电子束传输设计
known_gaps: The functional_reference mode has no governed N>=100 solver runner or current evidence
Final particle model is not reopened and recomputed under the current GUI gate
The historical 34.18% value is not a current usable-final-state result
Unweighted test particles do not support a beam-current claim or wall-resolved loss attribution
No interface contract to the downstream EI source has been frozen
